raw_consumer_statement:
In the fall of XXXX, I lost my XXXX  so on XX/XX/XXXX I ordered refurbished XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX  on the Best Buy website, using my Best Buy Citi card to complete the purchase. I was not satisfied with the condition they came in so the day after I received them, XX/XX/XXXX, I went into the Best Buy near me and exchanged the refurbished headphones for brand new XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX. I owed a balance of {$33.00} for the difference in price of which I paid for using a mastercard ( not my best buy citi card ). I found my XXXX  a month later and went into the same Best Buy store near me, on XX/XX/XXXX, and asked them to return the headphones. This was past their return window of 14 days however, they made an exception and returned the product. On XX/XX/XXXX I received a refund of {$33.00} to my XXXX but I have not received the refund of {$160.00} that I am owed to my Best Buy Citi card. 

I have opened at least XXXX disputes with Citi card and on the most recent dispute, I submitted a letter similar to this XXXX and included attachments of the XXXX receipts involved as well as screenshots of my call log to show that I did contact the best buy store that this took place as well as a screenshot of a voicemail transcription from a best buy employee confirming that they contacted their higher up department and a credit was sent to my citi card. I also included bank statements of my Citi card showing that no credit was given for the product that was returned. 

Every dispute I submitted to Citi has been denied including the most recent one with all of the proof I provided to them. My most recent call with them took place on XX/XX/XXXX after I learned that my dispute was denied, I asked for the call to be escalated and was told there was no one else I could speak to, the woman on the phone told me they would send the dispute department a letter asking them to look at all the documentation I sent to them to which I asked her if they did not look at the paperwork in the first place. I have not received any contact or letters with an update. 

I have called Best Buy Citi bank on : XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX
